zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke於1290年12月17日出生在英國薩默塞特哈爾可姆時，他的父親Walter Huse20歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Verdum11歲。他和Alinora D'Aubigny至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1338年2月24日在英國薩默塞特享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke于1290年12月17日出生在英国薩默塞特哈爾可姆时，他的父亲Walter Huse20岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Verdum11岁。他和Alinora D'Aubigny至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1338年2月24日在英国薩默塞特享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for someone who habitually wore a distinctive pair of boots or gaiters, from Old French hosed, hoset, housé, Middle English hosey, hus(s)y,‘booted, gaitered’ (from Latin hosatus).

English: status name or nickname from Middle English hus(e)wyf ‘mistress of a family; wife of a householder’ (a compound of Old English hūs ‘house’ + wīf ‘woman’). Though originally a woman's name, it is often found as a male surname, presumably in a derogatory sense. The vocabulary word became hussie, with the meaning ‘disreputable woman’, in the 16th century; the surname, however, is not associated with this meaning.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’. This was the name of a bardic family associated with the Maguires of Fermanagh, also Anglicized as Oswell or Oswald .

variants.name: Hosea
meanings: English: variant of   Hussey  . Similarity with the Old Testament prophet's name Hosea (see 3 below) is accidental.
English: in Scotland, where the name is more common, it is sometimes a variant of   Hosie  , itself a form of   Hussey  , or else a variant of   Hossack  .
African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the Biblical personal name Hosea. In the Old Testament, Hosea was a prophet who married a prostitute in order to illustrate Israel's unfaithfulness to God.

variants.name: Hosie
meanings: Scottish (northeast Scotland): variant of Irish   Hussey  .

variants.name: Oswell
meanings: Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’ (see Hussey ).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke was born on 17 December 1290, in Charlcombe, Somerset, England, his father, Walter Huse, was 20 and his mother, Mary Elizabeth Verdum, was 11. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Alinora D'Aubigny. He died on 24 February 1338, in Somerset, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke est né le 17 décembre 1290, à Charlcombe, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Walter Huse, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Verdum, avait 11 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Alinora D'Aubigny. Il est décédé le 24 février 1338, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke am 17. Dezember 1290 in Charlcombe, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Huse 20 und seine Mutter Mary Elizabeth Verdum 11. Er hatte mit Alinora D'Aubigny mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Februar 1338 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke è nato il il 17 dicembre 1290 nel Charlcombe, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Walter Huse, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Mary Elizabeth Verdum, aveva 11 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Alinora D'Aubigny. Morì il 24 febbraio 1338, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbrokeが1290年12月17日にイギリスソメルセトチャールコンベで生まれた時，父Walter Huseは20歳，母Mary Elizabeth Verdumは11歳であった。彼はAlinora D'Aubignyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1338年2月24日にイギリスソメルセトで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke(이)가 1290년 12월 17일 영국 서머세트 찰코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Huse(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Verdum(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Alinora D'Aubigny(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1338년 2월 24일 영국 서머세트에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.17 December 1290–24 February 1338: 1290 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 17–1338 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 24

pt.17 December 1290–24 February 1338: 17 de dezembro de 1290–24 de fevereiro de 1338
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke nasceu em 17 de dezembro de 1290, em Charlcombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Huse, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Verdum, tinha 11 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Alinora D'Aubigny. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1338, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke родился 17 декабря 1290 г. в местности чарлкомб, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Huse было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Verdum, 11. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Alinora D'Aubigny. Он умер 24 февраля 1338 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.17 December 1290–24 February 1338: 17 de diciembre de 1290–24 de febrero de 1338
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke nació el 17 de diciembre de 1290, en Charlcombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Huse, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth Verdum, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Alinora D'Aubigny. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1338, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
